completed_work: Added provider CLI help tests for the default and override wording.
Verified with full pytest suite: 193 passed.
key_decisions: Document the conditional provider default directly in CLI help text.
Keep explicit override precedence visible to users, including --max-warning-admissions 0.
next_actions: Move to the next AI-Lab ergonomics target: centralize provider latest-context policy/default display or add a compact policy audit command.
risks: Argparse may wrap long option names in help output, so tests normalize wrapped text.
summary_text: AI-Lab updated provider CLI help text for the warning admission cap default. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now state that provider latest-context runs default max_warning_admissions to 1 when --require-admission is enabled and --max-warning-admissions is omitted. The help text also documents that explicit values, including 0, are preserved. Tests were added for both provider CLI help outputs, including normalization for argparse wrapping of --require-admission. The full suite passed with 193 tests. This closes the final UX/documentation gap after the provider warning-cap default implementation and verification.
